allow: Bash(../.venv/Scripts/python -c "from app import app; print\('Flask app created OK'\)")

Bash(python -c "from app import app, db; app.app_context\(\).push\(\); from sqlalchemy import inspect; i = inspect\(db.engine\); print\('Tables:', i.get_table_names\(\)\); from models.box import Box; boxes = Box.query.all\(\); print\('Boxes:', [b.to_dict\(\) for b in boxes]\)")
